roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT MOTION TO CONTINUE PC 1050 FILED
DEFT'S MOTION CONTINUE RESTITUTION HEARING FILED
DEF MOT TO CONT REST HR FILED AT INSISTENCE
PROBATION UPDATED PER AB 1950
OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO DETAIN DEFT WITHOUT BAIL FILED

/CAL:RESTITUTION HEARING/NP/X:PARTIES STIPULATED TO THE AMOUNT OF RESTITUTION ORDERED/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL PAY RESTITUTION IN THE AMOUNT OF 5,078,27 TO TAMI ZHU/X:CR-110 ORDER FOR VICTIM RESTITUTION AND CR-111 ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FOR RESTITUTION ARE SIGNED AND FILED IN COURT,/CCU/CTORD:COUNSEL TO INFORM DEFENDANT TO REPORT TO ROOM 101 ON OR BEFORE 05-11-22, TO SETUP AN ACCOUNT WITH CCU/CONTPROB/
/CAL:RESTITUTION HEARING/DAWT/X: THE COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION FOR PURPOSES OF VICTIM RESTITUTION AFTERPROBATION EXPIRES WITH STIPULATIONS FROM ATTORNEYS/CONT/DOPU: COUNSEL HAS AUTHORITY/

/CAL:RESTITUTION DETERMINATION/DAWT/CONTD APD MISD REST REPORT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED  TO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT'S RESTITUTION UNITFOR DETERMINATION OF MISDEMEANOR VICTIM RESTITUTION,/RESTRPT:02-18-21/CONTD:MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION IN DEPARTMENT 30/DOPU:WITHPD AUTHORITY/

/CAL:DA MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL/MO DENIED/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/LD:08-21-20/WEAP/RX/SA2:328 SHOTWELL ST,, SF/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:08-21-20/987,2/NB/X:NO BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/X:THE PEOPLE FILED MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL/X:THE PEOPLE FILED EXHIBITS FOR MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL//X:THE COURT SIGNED ORDER SEALING EXHIBITS FOR MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL/CONTD:THE PEOPLE'S MOTION TO DETAIN AND BAIL REVIEW/DOP/
